name: Christmas Wreaths
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the marshmallows and butter in a double boiler over low heat.
2. Add vanilla extract and green food coloring to the melted mixture.
3. Stir in the whole cornflakes while keeping them warm, then drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto foil.
4. Shape the spoonfuls into wreaths.
5. Trim the wreaths with red hots and silver decorations.
6. Allow the wreaths to cool or refrigerate until ready to serve. Yield: Approximately 1 1/2 dozen cookies.
